## Scope Check

- [ ] The entry is about embodied agents, not only VLA policy learning, world modeling, or low-level control.
- [ ] The work includes embodied perception, memory, reasoning, planning, interaction, navigation, manipulation, or evaluation.
- [ ] The entry is placed in the most specific section.
- [ ] The entry uses the compact format: `* [YEAR] Title [[paper](URL)] [[project](URL)] [[code](URL)]`.
- [ ] Entries in the section remain sorted by year in descending order.
- [ ] Links are official whenever possible.
